name: YouTubearr
description: Monitor YouTube channels for livestreams and auto-create/remove channels. Zero API quota — uses yt-dlp.

settings.label: Monitored YouTube Channels
Monitored Streams (Direct URLs)
settings.helper_text:
Optional. One YouTube URL or bare video ID per line. These specific streams are checked each cycle — a channel is created when live and removed when ended (same behaviour as handle monitoring). Lines starting with # are ignored.

Examples:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ
dQw4w9WgXcQ
https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ

settings.label: Stream Profile (yt-dlp)
settings.helper_text: Select a yt-dlp Stream Profile to apply to created channels. Cookies configured on this profile will also be used for live stream detection.

settings.label: Target Playlist (Standard)
settings.helper_text: Standard playlist to associate created channels with. Leave empty to skip.

settings.label: Target Playlist (Custom)
settings.helper_text: Custom playlist to add created channels to. Leave empty to skip.

settings.label: Channel Group
settings.helper_text: Group name for created channels. The group will be created automatically if it does not exist.

settings.label: Stream Quality
settings.helper_text: Quality preference used when checking live stream metadata via yt-dlp.

settings.label: Auto-cleanup Ended Streams
settings.helper_text: Automatically delete channels when their YouTube livestream ends. Runs during each monitoring cycle.

settings.label: Starting Channel Number
settings.helper_text: First channel number to assign. Each new stream increments from here.

settings.label: Channel Number Increment
settings.helper_text: How much to increment the channel number for each new stream.

settings.label: Channel Numbering Mode
settings.helper_text: Decimal mode groups streams from the same YouTube channel together using the channel's BaseNumber. Sequential mode uses a global counter.

settings.label: Enable Automatic Monitoring
settings.helper_text: Run monitoring automatically on the schedule below. Requires the scheduler to be running (php artisan schedule:run).

settings.label: Monitor Schedule (cron)
settings.helper_text: Cron expression for automatic monitoring. Default: every 15 minutes. Examples: */5 * * * * (every 5 min), 0 * * * * (hourly).

fields.label: YouTube URL(s)
fields.helper_text: One or more YouTube livestream URLs (newline or comma-separated).
